title: hydrangea macrophylla subsp. stylosa
intro: Hydrangea macrophylla subsp. stylosa, also known as the mountain hydrangea or blue-flowering hydrangea, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Hydrangaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing swelling and improving cardiovascular health, due to its flavonoid and phenolic acid content. Herbal preparations of Hydrangea macrophylla subsp. stylosa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although its efficacy and safety should be further studied.
